items.text: Oversight Cycle Extension - Operator financial health & stability.

details.Present: Financial monitoring is conducted according to basic regulation.
details.Suitable: Financial processes ensure resources for stable flight operations exist.
details.Operating: No financial risk indicators detected during the past oversight period.
details.Effective: Robust financial cushion with clear separation of safety budgets and accountability.

items.text: Oversight Cycle Extension - Continuous compliance history.

details.Present: The operator resolves level 1 and level 2 findings within deadlines.
details.Suitable: The operator shows low volume of systemic findings over consecutive audits.
details.Operating: No significant or level 1 findings recorded in the past 24 months.
details.Effective: Demonstrated record of zero major findings and proactive self-reporting of non-compliances.
